stem: A software testing study surveys 50 test cases and observes 21 positive outcomes out of 50 (42.0%). Estimate the true software bug rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.42. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2937, 0.5577]. Point estimate: 0.4257.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
